answers: Starter anime: Death Note, Attack on Titan, Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood, One Punch Man, Demon Slayer.
Anime platforms: Crunchyroll, Netflix, Funimation. Subbed (original Japanese) is preferred by most fans over dubbed.
Anime genres: shonen (Naruto, One Piece), thriller (Death Note), romance (Your Name), comedy (One Punch Man).
Anime ki: Japanese animation covering every genre. Deep stories, amazing art, and something for everyone.
